CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(City), "Cubix, Hampton by Hilton, 42-50 Kimpton Road, Luton, Bedfordshire, LU2 0FP", IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Street)), Street + ", ", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(City)), City + ", ", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(State)), State + ", ", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(PostalCode)), PostalCode + ", ", "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Country)), Country, "" ) )
CustomField.label: Address for email
